12 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Content Author, UX Designer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://france.fr/en/article/shopping-nice-four-leads-finding-everything-your-heart-desires (1 occurrences)
  • https://france.fr/fr/itineraire/parcours-gourmand-pays-basque (1 occurrences)

  • https://france.fr/en/archives (1 occurrences)
  • https://france.fr/es/archivos (1 occurrences)
  • https://france.fr/es/info-practica (1 occurrences)
  • https://france.fr/fr/archives (1 occurrences)
  • https://france.fr/it/archivi (1 occurrences)
  • https://france.fr/it/info-pratiche (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3>1. Fashion.</h3>
XPath: h3:nth-child(2)
Example 2 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3 class="heading-5 mb-4" data-v-03e0c27b="">Étapes de l'itinéraire</h3>
XPath: .mb-4
Example 3 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3 class="heading-5 mb-4" data-v-03e0c27b="">Étapes de l'itinéraire</h3>
XPath: .mb-4
Example 4 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3>La vigna è onnipresente in Occitania, dove rappresenta un terzo delle superfici coltivate. Dal Rodano ai Pirenei, il vitigno del Pays d’Oc è cresciuto con l’obiettivo di un’alleanza perfetta tra i vitigni e il territorio.</h3>
XPath: #undefined-0 > h3
Example 5 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3 data-v-08de3870="" class="AfCard__title heading-5"><a data-v-08de3870="" class="AfCard__link" href="/cs/clanek/netradicni-ubytovani-na-horach/" target="">Top netradiční ubytování na horách</a></h3>

Example 1 View on Page

Mode: light

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<button class="AfButton AfButton--primary AfButton--small AfButton--red label-s" data-v-6458d367="">
Example 2 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a href="/en/" class="AfButton AfButton--primary AfButton--small AfButton--white label-s" data-v-6458d367="">
Example 3 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light

Example 4 View on Page

Mode: light
<input data-v-5dc68d54="" maxlength="40" type="search" placeholder="Que recherchez-vous ? " id="main-search-mobile">
Example 5 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<button data-v-5dc68d54="" type="submit" class="AfSearchBar__button color-blue radius-s">

Example 1 View on Page
Check the keyboard focus indicator is visible when using CSS declaration for 'border' or 'outline'
Mode: light
<button aria-hidden="false" class="sc-hKgJUU dAvqTA" tabindex="0" role="button" id="axeptio_main_button" title="Gérez vos préférences en matière de cookies et données personnelles">

Example 4 View on Page

<select name="language-picker" id="language-picker" class="AfFormSelect__input label-m py-4 pl-4 pr-7 radius-s border-grey" data-v-b68278f0="">

<input data-v-5dc68d54="" maxlength="40" type="search" placeholder="Que recherchez-vous ? " id="main-search-mobile">

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "button" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <button>
Mode: light
<button aria-hidden="false" class="sc-hKgJUU dAvqTA" tabindex="0" role="button" id="axeptio_main_button" title="Gérez vos préférences en matière de cookies et données personnelles">
Example 2 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "banner" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <header>
Mode: light
<header data-v-a489e6a5="" role="banner" class="AfHeader">
Example 3 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "navigation" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <nav>
Mode: light
<nav data-v-ae133027="" data-v-a489e6a5="" aria-label="Menu" role="navigation" class="AfSkipLinks wrapper bg-greyLight paragraph-m pa-3">
Example 4 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "navigation" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <nav>
Mode: light
<nav data-v-23b10f10="" data-v-976ff9f5="" aria-label="Navigation principale" role="navigation" class="AfNavigation" id="main-navigation-mobile">
Example 5 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "main" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <main>
Mode: light
<main id="main-content" role="main" class="AfHomePage">
